jurisdiction_name: Switzerland Of Ohio Local Sd (Monroe Co.)
narrative:
Switzerland Of Ohio Local Sd school district has 10,658 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points.
